summary: Location Visibility Toggle feature tested - ALL TESTS PASSED. Admin can toggle location visibility (is_active) to show/hide locations. Hidden locations correctly don't appear on public page.
critical_code_review_comments: Location visibility toggle implemented correctly in edit modal with Eye/EyeOff icons
Backend correctly filters by is_active:true for public /api/locations endpoint
Admin /api/admin/locations endpoint returns all locations including hidden ones
Hidden locations show 'Hidden' badge in admin edit mode with red background and EyeOff icon
Toggle button correctly changes between green 'Visible' and red outlined 'Hidden' states

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI features verified working via Playwright

seed_data_creation: Hibachi Food Truck was used for testing visibility toggle (toggled hidden then back to visible)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Location visibility toggle feature fully functional. Backend API at /api/admin/locations/{id} accepts is_active boolean field. Frontend toggle at data-testid='location-visibility-toggle' in edit location modal. Public /api/locations only returns is_active:true locations.

Admin login and access locations page.details: Admin can login at /admin and navigate to /locations with admin bar visible

Edit Locations button and edit mode.details: data-testid='edit-locations-btn' found and clickable, enters edit mode with 'Click to Edit' badges

Click location to open edit modal.details: Location cards clickable in edit mode, opens EDIT LOCATION modal

Location Visibility toggle in modal.details: data-testid='location-visibility-toggle' shows Eye/EyeOff icons with Visible/Hidden text

Toggle changes visibility state.details: Clicking toggle changes from 'VISIBLE' to 'HIDDEN' with visual feedback

Save location with visibility change.details: Save Changes button works, changes persisted to database

Hidden locations show badge in admin edi.details: Hidden locations show red 'Hidden' badge with EyeOff icon on card

Public locations page hides hidden locat.details: Hidden Hibachi Food Truck NOT shown on public /locations page (8 locations visible instead of 9)
